diagnostics.message: Command 'PostTag.create' takes a manual 'postId' with no nested create on 'Post' (e.g. addMilestone) and no event reaction that supplies it. Consider a parent command that sets the FK from self.id, or an on Event reaction with params { postId: ... }.

Command 'PostTag.create' takes a manual 'tagId' with no nested create on 'Tag' (e.g. addMilestone) and no event reaction that supplies it. Consider a parent command that sets the FK from self.id, or an on Event reaction with params { tagId: ... }.
